headline: Stable negative sentiment (score: -92.1)
key_insights: Fears trending up 71% over 7 days (strong momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations dominate with 109 quotes and 76 at strong intensity - people are expressing anger and annoyance more forcefully than usual.

• This frustration score sits in the middle-to-upper range historically, showing elevated but not extreme discontent.

• Fears improved significantly from yesterday's very low point, while optimism remains deeply negative with twice as many strong quotes as mild ones.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
